hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE="${TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH:-${TOOL_INPUT_file_path:-}}"; if [ -z "$FILE" ]; then exit 0; fi; case "$FILE" in internal/generated/*) echo "BLOCK: Do not edit generated files in internal/generated/. Edit api/*.yaml and run make generate-openapi instead." >&2; exit 2;; postman/results-*|postman/test-results.json) echo "BLOCK: Do not edit generated Newman/Postman result artifacts." >&2; exit 2;; esac; exit 0'

bash -c 'FILE="${TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH:-${TOOL_INPUT_file_path:-}}"; CONTENT="${TOOL_INPUT_NEW_STRING:-${TOOL_INPUT_new_string:-${TOOL_INPUT_CONTENT:-${TOOL_INPUT_content:-}}}}"; if [ -z "$FILE" ] || [ -z "$CONTENT" ]; then exit 0; fi; case "$FILE" in *.go) ;; *) exit 0;; esac; if echo "$CONTENT" | grep -qE "\"math/rand\"" && ! echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "_test\.go$"; then echo "WARN: Using math/rand in production code. Use crypto/rand for security-sensitive operations." >&2; fi; if echo "$CONTENT" | grep -qiE "(password|secret|apikey|api_key|token)\s*[:=]+\s*\"[^\"]+\"" && ! echo "$CONTENT" | grep -qE "(os\.Getenv|GetEnv|_test\.go|example|Example)"; then echo "WARN: Possible hardcoded secret detected. Use environment variables instead." >&2; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'FILE="${TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH:-${TOOL_INPUT_file_path:-}}"; CONTENT="${TOOL_INPUT_NEW_STRING:-${TOOL_INPUT_new_string:-${TOOL_INPUT_CONTENT:-${TOOL_INPUT_content:-}}}}"; if [ -z "$FILE" ] || [ -z "$CONTENT" ]; then exit 0; fi; case "$FILE" in internal/repository/*.go) ;; *) exit 0;; esac; if echo "$CONTENT" | grep -qE "fmt\.Sprintf\(.*(WHERE|VALUES|SET).*(%s|%v)"; then echo "BLOCK: SQL injection risk — do not interpolate user values with fmt.Sprintf in SQL queries. Use parameterized queries ($1, $2, etc.) instead." >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'FILE="${TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH:-${TOOL_INPUT_file_path:-}}"; CONTENT="${TOOL_INPUT_NEW_STRING:-${TOOL_INPUT_new_string:-${TOOL_INPUT_CONTENT:-${TOOL_INPUT_content:-}}}}"; if [ -z "$FILE" ] || [ -z "$CONTENT" ]; then exit 0; fi; case "$FILE" in internal/payments/*.go|internal/crypto/*.go|internal/security/*.go) ;; *) exit 0;; esac; if echo "$CONTENT" | grep -qE "fmt\.Print|log\.Print" && echo "$CONTENT" | grep -qiE "(privat|secret|seed|mnemonic|key[^w])"; then echo "WARN: Potential secret logging in sensitive package. Never log private keys, seeds, or mnemonics." >&2; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'FILE="${TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH:-${TOOL_INPUT_file_path:-}}"; CONTENT="${TOOL_INPUT_NEW_STRING:-${TOOL_INPUT_new_string:-${TOOL_INPUT_CONTENT:-${TOOL_INPUT_content:-}}}}"; if [ -z "$FILE" ] || [ -z "$CONTENT" ]; then exit 0; fi; case "$FILE" in internal/ipfs/*.go) ;; *) exit 0;; esac; if echo "$CONTENT" | grep -qE "Unpin|RemovePin|unpin" && ! echo "$CONTENT" | grep -qE "reference.*check|refcount|isReferenced"; then echo "WARN: IPFS unpin without reference check. Verify content is not referenced by any video before unpinning." >&2; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'FILE="${TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH:-${TOOL_INPUT_file_path:-}}"; CONTENT="${TOOL_INPUT_NEW_STRING:-${TOOL_INPUT_new_string:-${TOOL_INPUT_CONTENT:-${TOOL_INPUT_content:-}}}}"; if [ -z "$FILE" ] || [ -z "$CONTENT" ]; then exit 0; fi; case "$FILE" in internal/activitypub/*.go) ;; *) exit 0;; esac; if echo "$CONTENT" | grep -qE "http://" && echo "$CONTENT" | grep -qE "(Inbox|Outbox|webfinger|nodeinfo|actor)" && ! echo "$CONTENT" | grep -qE "(test|Test|localhost|127\.0\.0\.1)"; then echo "WARN: HTTP (not HTTPS) URL in ActivityPub code. Federation requires HTTPS for security." >&2; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'FILE="${TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH:-${TOOL_INPUT_file_path:-}}"; CONTENT="${TOOL_INPUT_NEW_STRING:-${TOOL_INPUT_new_string:-${TOOL_INPUT_CONTENT:-${TOOL_INPUT_content:-}}}}"; if [ -z "$FILE" ] || [ -z "$CONTENT" ]; then exit 0; fi; case "$FILE" in *_test.go|*/federation/*|*/auth/oauth*) exit 0;; */httpapi/handlers/*.go) ;; *) exit 0;; esac; if echo "$CONTENT" | grep -qE "context\.(Background|TODO)\(\)"; then echo "WARN: context.Background()/TODO() in handler code. Use r.Context() for request-scoped context. Exception: fire-and-forget goroutines that must outlive the request." >&2; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'FILE="${TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH:-${TOOL_INPUT_file_path:-}}"; CONTENT="${TOOL_INPUT_NEW_STRING:-${TOOL_INPUT_new_string:-${TOOL_INPUT_CONTENT:-${TOOL_INPUT_content:-}}}}"; if [ -z "$FILE" ] || [ -z "$CONTENT" ]; then exit 0; fi; case "$FILE" in *_test.go|*/federation/*|*/auth/oauth*) exit 0;; */httpapi/handlers/*.go) ;; *) exit 0;; esac; if echo "$CONTENT" | grep -qE "json\.NewEncoder\(w\)\.Encode"; then echo "WARN: Raw json.NewEncoder(w).Encode bypasses response envelope. Use shared.WriteJSON() or shared.WriteJSONWithMeta() for PeerTube API compatibility." >&2; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'FILE="${TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH:-${TOOL_INPUT_file_path:-}}"; if [ -z "$FILE" ]; then exit 0; fi; case "$FILE" in *.go) if command -v gofmt >/dev/null 2>&1; then gofmt -s -w "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi; if command -v goimports >/dev/null 2>&1; then goimports -w "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi;; esac; exit 0'
